name: webtalk_terminate
short_description: Terminate webtalk mgr previously initialized via webtalk_init.
full_help:
webtalk_terminate

Description: 
Terminate webtalk mgr previously initialized via webtalk_init.

Syntax: 
webtalk_terminate  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
